title: thymus teucrioides subsp. teucrioides
intro: Thymus teucrioides subsp. teucrioides, also known as the thyme-leaved or shrubby thyme, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized in treating wounds, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Thymus teucrioides subsp. teucrioides include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
